title: Echinocactus salpigophorus
taxonomy: Echinocactus salpigophorus is classified as a species of cactus within the family Cactaceae. It belongs to the genus Echinocactus and is native to Mexico. The Cactaceae family is a group of flowering plants that are primarily found in the Americas. Echinocactus salpigophorus is often classified as an endangered species due to habitat loss and overcollection.
uses: Echinocactus salpigophorus, also known as the Pink Ball Cactus, has been utilized in traditional medicine, particularly in Mexico.
